description: Multi-line text input with 2 sizes (large/xLarge), auto-resize support, row-based height control (minRows/maxRows), and FormField context integration. Reuses TextField color tokens for visual consistency.

id.description: Textarea element ID. Auto-provided by FormField context, or set directly.

size.description: Size variant. Controls padding, typography, and border-radius. Height is content-driven.

minRows.description: Minimum row count. Determines min-height based on line-height (large: 24px, xLarge: 26px).

maxRows.description: Maximum row count. Determines max-height. Content scrolls when exceeded. Unlimited if unset.

autoResize.description: Auto-adjusts height based on content. Bounded by minRows/maxRows. Uses useLayoutEffect + scrollHeight.

error.description: Error state. Changes background/border to error colors. Auto-provided by FormField context.

positive.description: Success state. Changes border color only (no icon for Textarea).

disabled.description: Disabled state. Muted colors, cursor-not-allowed. Auto-provided by FormField context.

readOnly.description: Read-only state. Subtle background, no hover overlay. Auto-provided by FormField context.

fullWidth.description: When true, container is w-full. When false, w-fit with min-w-[200px].

pill.description: Overrides border-radius to 9999px for fully rounded appearance.

value.description: Controlled value. Triggers auto-resize recalculation when changed.

onChange.description: Standard onChange handler. Also triggers auto-resize if enabled.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text with dedicated color token (reuses TextField tokens).

positive.description: Background and border remain in normal state (same as TextField positive behavior).

implementation.pattern: CVA + cn (no Radix Slot, no asChild)
implementation.stateOverlay: Absolute <span> sibling with group-hover/group-active. Hidden when disabled or readOnly.
implementation.focusDetection: pointerRef tracks mouse vs keyboard focus. ring-2 only for keyboard focus.
implementation.autoResizeStrategy: useLayoutEffect recalculates on mount, value change, and onChange. Sets el.style.height='auto' then reads scrollHeight, clamped between minRows*lineHeight and maxRows*lineHeight.
implementation.heightCalculation: minHeight = lineHeight * minRows (inline style). maxHeight = lineHeight * maxRows or undefined (inline style). resize: 'none' forced via inline style.
implementation.mergedRef: useCallback merges forwarded ref + internal textareaRef for auto-resize DOM access.
implementation.formFieldIntegration: Merges id, error, disabled, readOnly, required from FormField context. Context values serve as fallback.
implementation.colorTokenReuse: All color tokens reuse --comp-textfield-* variables (no separate --comp-textarea-* color tokens).
